component.name: hps-system
component.description: Host Provisioning Service - bash PXE/DHCP/TFTP/HTTP provisioning platform

properties.name: hps:versioning
properties.value: Component versions track the debian:trixie-slim base image suite and are resolved at build time (no pinning); CVE scans should resolve against the trixie suite. See rules/release-workflow.md SBOM dependency rule.

components.name: bash
components.description: Command interpreter - the language HPS is written in; also present on Alpine/BusyBox nodes as pkg:apk/alpine/bash

components.name: jq
components.description: JSON processor - registry read/write and the API request/response path

components.name: dnsmasq
components.description: DHCP, TFTP and DNS server for PXE boot and cluster addressing

components.name: nginx
components.description: HTTP server fronting the CGI boot manager, the JSON API, and the distro/package repositories

components.name: fcgiwrap
components.description: FastCGI wrapper executing the bash CGI endpoints

components.name: spawn-fcgi
components.description: Spawns the fcgiwrap worker pool

components.name: supervisor
components.description: Process supervisor managing the IPS service set

components.name: rsyslog
components.description: Logging sink for HPS and cluster nodes

components.name: tftpd-hpa
components.description: TFTP daemon package present in the image (TFTP is served by dnsmasq at runtime)

components.name: ipxe
components.description: iPXE boot firmware images chainloaded during PXE boot

components.name: createrepo-c
components.description: Builds RPM repository metadata for Rocky node package serving

components.name: libarchive-tools
components.description: bsdtar and archive utilities for distro/image handling

components.name: curl
components.description: HTTP client used by node-side API calls and downloads

components.name: rsync
components.description: Repository and resource synchronisation

components.name: wget
components.description: Distro/package mirror downloads

components.name: gpg
components.description: Signature verification for downloaded packages/repositories

components.name: openssl
components.description: TLS toolkit; underpins the ctrl-exec dispatcher CA and mTLS

components.name: perl
components.description: Runtime for the ctrl-exec dispatcher hosted on the IPS

components.name: libwww-perl
components.description: ctrl-exec dispatcher HTTP client dependency

components.name: liblwp-protocol-https-perl
components.description: ctrl-exec dispatcher HTTPS transport dependency

components.name: libio-socket-ssl-perl
components.description: ctrl-exec mTLS socket dependency

components.name: libjson-perl
components.description: ctrl-exec JSON dependency

components.name: ctrl-exec
components.description: mTLS remote execution: dispatcher on the IPS, agent on each node - the node setup/exec mechanism (see docs/adr/0001-orchestration-split.md)

components.name: opensvc
components.description: Cluster service/VM availability management retained for durable services and VM HA (iscsi-manager, heartbeat, labels)

components.name: debian
components.description: Base image for the IPS container
